response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus proven ownership of open-source tools and cross-stack problem solving. His leadership in developer tooling and AI workflows directly matches the role’s focus on internal automation and scalability.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across enterprise environments
Proven AI-agent and developer tooling contributions, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows
Strong open-source leadership and testing culture with multiple published frameworks and workshops
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume — though equivalent experience (Node.js, testing frameworks) is evident
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles lack clear metrics or scale context (e.g., 'millions of mails' is cited but not how he contributed to scaling)
